Package com.rhlowery.acs.service.impl

Class DatabaseUserService

java.lang.Object
com.rhlowery.acs.service.impl.DatabaseUserService
All Implemented Interfaces:
UserService
@ApplicationScoped public class DatabaseUserService extends Object implements UserService
JPA-based implementation of the UserService. Uses Panache entities for database interaction and persona management.

    • listUsers

      public List<User> listUsers()
      Retrieves all users currently stored in the system.
      Specified by:
      listUsers in interface UserService
      Returns:
      A list of domain User objects mapped from persistent entities

      public List<Group> listGroups()
      Retrieves all user groups currently defined in the system.
      Specified by:
      listGroups in interface UserService
      Returns:
      A list of domain Group objects

    • getUser

      public Optional<User> getUser(String userId)
      Finds a specific user by their unique identifier.
      Specified by:
      getUser in interface UserService
      Parameters:
      userId - The unique ID (e.g. email or username) of the user
      Returns:
      An Optional containing the user if found, or empty otherwise

    • getGroup

      public Optional<Group> getGroup(String groupId)
      Finds a specific group by its unique identifier.
      Specified by:
      getGroup in interface UserService
      Parameters:
      groupId - The unique ID of the group
      Returns:
      An Optional containing the group if found, or empty otherwise

    • updateUserGroups

      public User updateUserGroups(String userId, List<String> groupsToUpdate)
      Updates the list of groups associated with a specific user.
      Specified by:
      updateUserGroups in interface UserService
      Parameters:
      userId - The ID of the user to update
      groupsToUpdate - The new list of group IDs
      Returns:
      The updated domain User object
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the user is not found

    • updateUserPersona

      public User updateUserPersona(String userId, String persona)
      Updates the system persona assigned to a specific user.
      Specified by:
      updateUserPersona in interface UserService
      Parameters:
      userId - The ID of the user to update
      persona - The new persona ID to assign
      Returns:
      The updated domain User object
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the user is not found

    • updateGroupPersona

      public Group updateGroupPersona(String groupId, String persona)
      Updates the system persona assigned to a specific group.
      Specified by:
      updateGroupPersona in interface UserService
      Parameters:
      groupId - The ID of the group to update
      persona - The new persona ID to assign
      Returns:
      The updated domain Group object
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the group is not found

      Saves or updates a user in the system.

      saveUser in interface UserService
      Parameters:
      user - The user domain object to persist
      Returns:
      The persisted domain User object

      Saves or updates a group in the system.

      saveGroup in interface UserService
      Parameters:
      group - The group domain object to persist

    • clear

      public void clear()
      Clears all users and groups from the database. Primarily used for testing purposes.
      Specified by:
      clear in interface UserService
